underlying_goal: Debug and fix a bash script (clad) that was showing rate limit errors when refreshing OAuth tokens for Claude credentials
friction_detail: Claude's initial fix introduced a set -e issue causing silent script exit, and initially tried a retry-and-wait approach the user didn't want.
brief_summary: User needed to fix a bash script's OAuth token refresh error handling; after iterative debugging including a set -e issue Claude introduced, the fix was committed and deployed.
